---
title: "test_crucible.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_crucible.py"
loc: 51
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.20
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.82
---

## Intent
The `test_crucible.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestCrucibleSecurity, test_deep_ast_bypass_prevention, TestQMDNeutering, test_neuter_qmd_no_yaml_injects_header, TestZombiePurge, test_sandbox_zombie_purge_on_timeout. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestCrucibleSecurity, test_deep_ast_bypass_prevention, TestQMDNeutering, test_neuter_qmd_no_yaml_injects_header, TestZombiePurge, test_sandbox_zombie_purge_on_timeout. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)
- [src.sentinel.sandbox_warden](file://src.sentinel.sandbox_warden)

### Exports
- `TestCrucibleSecurity`
- `test_deep_ast_bypass_prevention`
- `TestQMDNeutering`
- `test_neuter_qmd_no_yaml_injects_header`
- `TestZombiePurge`
- `test_sandbox_zombie_purge_on_timeout`
